strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated hands-on work with agentic workflows and AI infrastructure (re:cinq, MCP, AI-agent tooling)
Proven leadership in technical domains, including team scaling and CI/CD practices (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in resume
No explicit mention of regulated-environment operations or compliance infrastructure
Fintech-specific technologies (e.g., payment flows, embedded finance) are absent from skillset
response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed-systems and AI-infrastructure experience, including work on agentic workflows and MCP frameworks, which aligns with the agentic-AI architecture requirements. However, his background lacks direct fintech exposure (e.g., credit systems, payment flows) and regulated-environment operations, which are critical for this role. His technical leadership and team-scaling track record are solid, but the fintech gap may require additional validation.
